description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story retail building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a prominent overhang on one side, likely serving as a covered entrance or display area, with a ribbed or slatted texture suggesting a decorative or functional facade element. The main body of the building is smooth and unadorned, with a muted, light brown color palette that gives it a contemporary appearance. There are no visible windows or doors on most sides, except for the recessed area beneath the overhang, which may serve as the main entrance. The building sits low to the ground and appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or similar solid materials. Its simple geometry and lack of ornamentation suggest a utilitarian approach, suitable for a variety of retail uses in an urban environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed retail building with a ribbed facade element and a covered entrance area, finished in muted brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entrance area beneath a ribbed overhang, with shadowed space suggesting entry access.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, smooth wall with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, unbroken wall with a flat roof and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the overhang and ribbed facade, with the entrance area partially visible.
